name: Budget Insights
description: Owns analytics, projections, and daily, weekly, and monthly reporting. Awaiting its own brainstorm.
problem_statement: Raw transactions and monthly budget amounts do not tell Dirk whether spending pace is on track at daily, weekly, and monthly intervals or which categories require attention.
why_now: Once ledger and budget data exist, concise periodic analysis is the primary user outcome.

rationale: On-track analysis compares actual spend with monthly category budgets.
Classification quality improves category analytics, while uncategorized spend can still be reported explicitly.
Spend analysis is calculated from canonical transactions.
